title: Plastic Tablecloth 137*180cm Waterproof PVC Table Cover - Rectangular Strawberry Fruit Design, Wipeable, Oil-Resistant for Indoor/Outdoor Party, Picnic
features: 🍻「Material」- tablecloth is made of premium pvc, sturdy and durable, not easy to tear, Stain Resistant, Waterproof ,Washable and easy to clean.
🍻「Size」-You will receive 1 pack of 137 x 180 cm watercolor table covers,fit most rectangular tables of different sizes.You can also lay it on the ground and enjoy outdoor picnics.

🍻「Reuse or Dispose」-The tablecloth is lightweight, scratch resistant and waterproof, can effectively keep your table from spilled milk, juice, or soda and easy to clean.After the party, simply rinse and wipe off the plastic table covers for reuse in the next party or roll them up and dispose them off.

🍻「Wide Used」- We offer 11 styles of PVC tablecloths for you to choose from, These pvc disposable tablecloths are great for parties, weddings, catering, thanksgiving, Christmas, Baby Showers, BBQ cookouts, Outdoor events, catering, holiday décor, restaurant, home use, and any other event.
🍻「High quality service」-If you have any questions about the product or delivery, you can contact us and we will provide you with a satisfactory response within 24 hours.
description: 137cm x 180cm Rectangle Table Cloth, Waterproof Vinyl Tablecloths Wipeable Plastic Plaid Table Cover for Dining, Picnic, Indoor and Outdoor
